info.title: Gen-AI HTTP API
info.description: HTTP API for chat sessions, items, and SSE messages.

422.description: Title cannot be generated yet or LLM is not configured.

post.summary: Switch the active agent on an existing conversation

403.description: User has no access to target agent.

404.description: Conversation or target agent not found, or feature flag off.

422.description: Cannot switch in a preview conversation.

get.summary: List agents available to the current user in a workspace
get.description:
List agents the calling user can use in this workspace, sorted A-Z.

This is the personalized "usable here" view for the agent switcher --
access-filtered to the caller, enabled, non-preview, with per-agent
lastUsedAt. For agent CRUD/management use the metadata entity endpoint
GET /api/v1/entities/agents instead.

post.description: Note: This API is an experimental and is going to change. Please, use it accordingly. Generates a natural-language summary of a dashboard's visualizations, optionally scoped by an explicit filter context.

get.summary: (EXPERIMENTAL) AI observability overview for the caller's organization
get.description: Returns AI usage stats for the caller's organization for the current calendar month, alongside the previous month's value. Backed by the ai_usage_counters table populated by the metering pipeline.

post.description: Upload a new knowledge document. Returns 409 if filename already exists.

put.description: Upload or replace a knowledge document.

get.description: List knowledge documents accessible from the workspace (local + inherited + org-level).
Download a knowledge document's raw file. Inherited and org-level docs are visible.
Get a single knowledge document's metadata. Inherited and org-level docs are visible.

delete.description: Delete a knowledge document and all its chunks (local docs only).

patch.description: Patch a knowledge document's metadata (local docs only).

get.description: Search the knowledge base using semantic similarity across the workspace ancestor chain.

post.description: Upload a new org-scoped knowledge document.

put.description: Upload or replace an org-scoped knowledge document.

get.description: Download an org-scoped knowledge document's raw file.
Get a single org-scoped knowledge document's metadata.

delete.description: Delete an org-scoped knowledge document and all its chunks.

patch.description: Patch an org-scoped knowledge document's metadata.

get.description: Search org-scoped knowledge documents using semantic similarity.

AgentListItemResponse.title: AgentListItemResponse
AgentListItemResponse.description: A single agent visible to the calling user in the workspace.

AgentListResponse.title: AgentListResponse
AgentListResponse.description: List of agents accessible to the calling user.

AlertExecution.title: AlertExecution
AlertExecution.description:
Execution definition (AFM) of the alert.

``measures`` / ``attributes`` / ``filters`` are opaque AFM wire objects (same
treatment as ``KeyDriverAnalysis.filters``); the semantic typing the FE renders
lives on the typed ``condition`` union.

dashboard.description: Dashboard the alert is bound to.

forMode.title: Formode
forMode.description: Display mode for the monitored population.

AlertProposal.title: AlertProposal
AlertProposal.description:
Structured pre-creation alert proposal — the single model used as the HTTP DTO,
the persisted shape, and the in-memory conversation-state object.

alertProposal.description: Optional full alert proposal payload when available.

cron.title: Cron
cron.description: Cron expression for the alert schedule.

dataset.description: Date dataset used for anomaly detection.

AnomalyDetectionGranularity.title: AnomalyDetectionGranularity
AnomalyDetectionGranularity.description: Time-based granularity supported by anomaly detection.

operator.description: Arithmetic operator between the two metrics.

ArithmeticOperator.title: ArithmeticOperator
ArithmeticOperator.description: Arithmetic operator between two metrics of a relative condition.

right.title: Right
right.description: Value or metric the left side is compared to.

ComparisonConditionOperator.title: ComparisonConditionOperator
ComparisonConditionOperator.description: Operator of a scalar comparison condition.

itemIndex.title: Itemindex
itemIndex.description: Zero-based item order within the response turn.

taskId.title: Taskid
taskId.description: Task identifier grouping related work items.

agentId.title: Agentid
agentId.description: Agent that processed this item. Populated on every persisted item once LX-2483 ships.

oldAgentId.title: Oldagentid
oldAgentId.description: Agent ID before the switch (marker rows only).

newAgentId.title: Newagentid
newAgentId.description: Agent ID after the switch (marker rows only).

actorUserId.title: Actoruserid
actorUserId.description: User who initiated the switch (marker rows only). NULL for drift-driven markers.

trigger.title: Trigger
trigger.description: Why the marker was written (marker rows only).

ConversationItemResponse.title: ConversationItemResponse
ConversationItemResponse.description: Conversation item returned by the agentic HTTP API.

isPreview.title: Ispreview
isPreview.description: Whether this is a preview conversation.

pinned.title: Pinned
pinned.description: Whether this conversation is pinned by the user.

agentId.title: Agentid
agentId.description: Identifier of the agent bound to this conversation (if any).

ConversationResponse.title: ConversationResponse
ConversationResponse.description: Conversation returned by the agentic HTTP API.

DocumentMetadataResponse.title: DocumentMetadataResponse
DocumentMetadataResponse.description: Document metadata returned by GET /documents/{document_id} and list.

id.title: Id
id.description: Function call item identifier from LLM.

IntervalGranularity.title: IntervalGranularity
IntervalGranularity.description: Date granularity for the interval of an ONCE_PER_INTERVAL trigger.

measure.description: Measure definition for key driver analysis.

dateAttributeId.title: Dateattributeid
dateAttributeId.description: Date attribute identifier used for period comparison.

kda.description: Optional full key driver analysis payload when available.

MeasureValueComparisonCondition.title: MeasureValueComparisonCondition
MeasureValueComparisonCondition.description: Comparison branch of a compound measure value condition: ``{"comparison": {...}}``.

MeasureValueRangeCondition.title: MeasureValueRangeCondition
MeasureValueRangeCondition.description: Range branch of a compound measure value condition: ``{"range": {...}}``.

localIdentifier.title: Localidentifier
localIdentifier.description: Local identifier of the metric to be compared.

MetricOperand.title: MetricOperand
MetricOperand.description: Reference to a metric by AFM local identifier.

suggestions.description: Optional follow-up suggestions for the user. Populated only on the terminal user-visible multipart of a turn.

ObservabilityMetricType.title: ObservabilityMetricType
ObservabilityMetricType.description: Metrics exposed by the AI observability endpoint.

summary.title: Summary
summary.description: Reasoning summary intended for UI display.

measure.description: Arithmetic combination of the two metrics.

threshold.description: Threshold the relative change is compared to.

sourceWorkspaceId.title: Sourceworkspaceid
sourceWorkspaceId.description: Workspace ID of the source object.

targetWorkspaceId.title: Targetworkspaceid
targetWorkspaceId.description: Workspace ID of the target object.

objects.title: Objects
objects.description: Search result objects for widget rendering.

SkillResponse.title: SkillResponse
SkillResponse.description: A single skill available to the organization.

query.title: Query
query.description: Exact message sent when the user clicks this action.

SuggestedAction.title: SuggestedAction
SuggestedAction.description: A quick-reply action button rendered alongside the follow-up question.

followUpQuestion.title: Followupquestion
followUpQuestion.description: Yes-answerable follow-up question recommending the next step.

actions.title: Actions
actions.description: Quick-reply action buttons. The first action matches the follow-up question.

Suggestions.title: Suggestions
Suggestions.description:
Follow-up suggestions emitted by the assistant alongside its terminal multipart message.

Carried on the assistant ``MultipartContent`` so suggestions are persisted in
conversation history and stream on the same SSE event as the response that
produced them.

filterContext.title: Filtercontext
filterContext.description: AFM filters in the same shape consumed by the AFM execute endpoint, merged on top of each visualization's stored filters using the type-aware merge rules. Omit or send `null` to fall back to the dashboard's saved filter context. Send `[]` to explicitly apply no request filters.

tabId.title: TabId
tabId.description: Local identifier of the dashboard tab to summarize. When the dashboard has tabs and `tabId` is omitted, the first tab is used (matching the UI's default tab). A `tabId` that does not match any tab's `localIdentifier` returns 404. Supplying `tabId` for a dashboard without tabs returns 400. When `tabId` is combined with `visualizations`, every supplied visualization must belong to the selected tab; otherwise the request returns 400.

value.title: Value
value.description: Value of the alert threshold to compare the metric to.

visualization.description: Optional full visualization payload (AAC JSON) when available.

whatIf.description: Optional full what-if scenario payload when available.

visualizationRef.title: Visualizationref
visualizationRef.description: Base visualization reference used by scenario.
